name: Fresh Apple-Chiffon Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Egg whites; from 7 large eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Prepare a 9- to 10-inch tube pan by greasing the bottom if it doesn't have a removable one, or line it with waxed paper.
3. In a large bowl, beat egg whites on medium speed until frothy. Gradually add granulated sugar, beating until foamy, thick, and stiff peaks form.
4. In another large bowl, beat brown sugar, apple juice, oil, egg yolks, and vanilla extract until well blended. Gradually mix in flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, nutmeg, and cloves. Fold in shredded apples.
5. Mix about 1/3 of the beaten whites into the apple mixture. Gently fold the remaining whites into the batter.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Carefully remove from the pan, loosen edges, and let cool completely.
8. Drizzle with bottled caramel sauce before serving.
Serves 12
Per serving: 270 calories, 5 grams protein, 47 grams carbohydrates, 7 grams fat, 35 milligrams cholesterol, 256 milligrams sodium. Exchanges: 1 1/2 starch/bread, 1 1/2 fruit, 1 1/2 fat
